system.description: *Debt Detonation.* Target one primary creature within 40 feet. Deal 12 + VEIL social damage plus 5 damage per Debt stack the primary target carries. Remove all primary target's Debt stacks. Then deal 6 + VEIL social damage plus 2 damage per Debt stack to each other enemy within 20 feet of the primary target (regardless of their own Debt stacks — they feel the resonant collapse of the primary target's debt).
